title: AH BackPack
description: A simple, strong Backpack Plugin for minecraft. Create shared Backpacks, easily!
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1854168202b30f0d9dcf42c733265e07b7c65ba7_0.webp)
## AH BackPack is the perfect Backpack Plugin, for creating shareable Backpacks!

Perfect for Minecraft Challenges or private Projects!

Simply create a shared Backpack using 
```
/ahpack assign [player1][player2]
```
(the Players who share the Backpack) and it's ready! 
just run: 
```
/bp
```
 or 
```
/ahpack
```
 to access it

If you don't have one you can enter /bp or /ahpack to access a not shared Backpack

You can also easily assign Backpacks to other Players using the config.yml or the command


You can also change the Size of Backpack in the config files!

You can also enable to drop the content of the Backpacks when the Player dies, with Team Backpacks, the content only drops if both Players are death (default = false)

### Permissions:

- backpack.use (allows using the /bp or /backpack command - default true)
- backpack.assign (allows the Player to assign Backpacks to other Players or unassign them - default op)
- badckpack.admin (allow the Player to acces command to reload the config or clear all data - default op)
